questions.question: Describe the main difference between a copy-on-write (CoW) and a normal write operation in a file system.
questions.hint: Explain the implications of CoW on file system performance and data integrity.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of using copy-on-write in a file system, and when is it typically used?
questions.hint: Discuss the benefits and drawbacks of CoW in different file system scenarios.

questions.question: How does a copy-on-write mechanism handle concurrent modifications to a file by multiple processes, and what are the potential consequences of this?
questions.hint: Explain the synchronization mechanisms required to prevent data corruption in CoW file systems.
